Package lumenaer

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Game
    Base class for all games.
    Lumenaer
    The lumenaer framework class for setting up games and displaying them either on a real 24x24 pixel matrix or in a window for development pruposes.
    LumenaerConstants  
    LumenaerStarter
    Starter class for the lumenaer programm.
    PixelMatrix
    Class representing the pixelArray matrix.
